meta.title: GroupStages — 2026 World Cup Group Stage Scenario Calculator
meta.description: Explore every group-stage scenario for the 2026 FIFA World Cup: live standings for 48 teams across 12 groups, third-place ranking, draw simulator, and match win probability predictions.

hero.title: Every group-stage scenario, at a glance
hero.subtitle: Live standings, third-place ranking, and match predictions for all 48 teams across 12 groups — updated as results come in.

features.title: What's included
features.subtitle: From the group stage to the knockout rounds, every analysis tool you need.

standings.title: Group-stage standings
standings.desc: Live standings for all 12 groups with points, goal difference, and goals scored — computed using the official FIFA tiebreaker order.

thirdPlace.title: Third-place ranking
thirdPlace.desc: Eight of the twelve third-place teams advance to the Round of 32. We classify each team as qualified, in contention, or eliminated based on remaining fixtures.

drawSim.title: Knockout draw simulator
drawSim.desc: Simulate the official FIFA knockout draw with pot composition and same-confederation constraints to preview possible bracket paths.

predictor.title: Win probability engine
predictor.desc: A Poisson model combining eloratings.net ELO and each team's last 10 matches of form produces win / draw / loss probabilities for every fixture.

step1.title: 1. Collect match results
step1.desc: Scores, cards, and injury data sync from API-Football every five minutes. Completed matches are treated as final; in-progress matches reflect the live score.

step2.title: 2. Simulate remaining fixtures
step2.desc: For each unfinished match we enumerate all 9×9 = 81 plausible scorelines (0:0 through 4:4) weighted by a Poisson distribution, then brute-force 6,561 outcome combinations per group.

step3.title: 3. Rank and classify
step3.desc: The official FIFA tiebreakers (points → goal difference → goals scored → head-to-head → fair-play → FIFA ranking) are applied in order to determine qualified, in-contention, and eliminated status.

footer.disclaimer: GroupStages is an unofficial project and is not affiliated with FIFA or the World Cup organizing committee. Match data is sourced from public providers including API-Football and eloratings.net.
